issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Trigger a Zap from a checkout backend on order completion, then segment customers in a Code step
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gets the generic webhook POST right but misses Zapier Code step semantics; treatment uses the documented hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch URL and the inputData/output = [{...}] pattern from the skill.

scenarios.name: Build a custom Zapier integration with newOrder trigger and createContact action
scenarios.rationale: Baseline fabricates SDK shape and misses the (z, bundle) convention; treatment uses the documented App.triggers/actions structure with z.request and bundle.meta.page pagination.
